Amina Hassan Yusuf
Nairobi, Kenya | amina.yusuf@example.org | +254 700 123456

Research Interests
Microfinance and financial inclusion
NGO accountability and nonprofit governance
Development studies in East Africa

Education
MBA in Finance, University of Nairobi, 2019
BSc in Accounting, Kenyatta University, 2015

Publications
Yusuf, A. H. (2022). Microfinance and poverty reduction in East Africa. Journal of Development Studies Practice.
Yusuf, A. H., & Otieno, P. (2021). NGO accountability mechanisms in Kenya. Nonprofit Quarterly Review.

Work Experience
Finance Manager, Hope International NGO, Nairobi, 2019-2024
Accountant, Deloitte Kenya, 2015-2019

Teaching
Guest lecturer, Introduction to Accounting, Kenyatta University, 2020-2022

Skills
Financial analysis
STATA and SPSS
Grant reporting
Quantitative research methods
